message:
test(core): add unit tests for recombination-radar and rna-structure

Add comprehensive test suites for two analysis modules:

recombination-radar.test.ts (23 tests):
- Edge cases for empty inputs
- K-mer matching and donor identification
- Window processing and configuration
- Segment merging and breakpoint detection
- Reference handling with case insensitivity

rna-structure.test.ts (24 tests):
- RNA window analysis with MFE calculation
- Synonymous stress computation for codons
- High-stress region detection
- Regulatory element detection (slippery sites, riboswitches)
- Edge cases for mixed case and N-containing sequences

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
